chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-2801 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders as to maintainability of petition ---------------------------------------------- 06.10.2025 This case was last taken up on 06.09.2024, which is over a year ago, when another counsel was holding brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioner. In the last one year, learned counsel for petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Apparently, issue of maintainability remains undecided. Today, despite lapse of one year, no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
